insurer.name: Aditya Birla Health Insurance Co. Limited

enrichment.tagline: Earn 100% premium back via fitness, day-1 chronic care, but 3-year PED wait unless you pay extra.
enrichment.plainSummary: Activ One is a hybrid health plan that pays you HealthReturns™ up to 100% of your premium for staying active, and offers day-1 inpatient cover for chronic conditions like diabetes if you pick the right variant (NXT/MAX+/SAVR). But the base pre-existing disease waiting period is 36 months—you’ll need to buy an add-on to cut it short, and not every variant unlocks the plan’s full power.
bestFor: Fitness-oriented individuals or families who will use the wellness tracking to earn back premium via HealthReturns™.
People with diabetes, hypertension, asthma, or other listed chronic conditions who want immediate inpatient cover (day 1) under NXT/MAX+/SAVR.
Households expecting multiple hospitalizations in a year — the unlimited Super Reload refills your base sum insured unlimited times from the second claim.
Anyone who wants a 100% cancer cover booster that doubles the base sum insured for cancer treatment.
notFor: Those with pre-existing conditions unwilling to pay extra: base PED wait is 3 years, and the reduction add-on still leaves 24 months or 1 year of wait.
Couples planning maternity — the policy explicitly excludes maternity expenses.
Buyers who pick VIP or VIP+ and lose Chronic Care, Cancer Booster, Claim Protect, and Super Credit — you’ll miss the plan’s signature benefits.
People who want a suite or above room; the highest room category option is Single Private Room.

strengths.text: Unlimited Super Reload: base sum insured refills unlimited times per year from the second claim — you can't run out of cover in a bad year.
strengths.basis: restoration.Super Reload.unlimited times, from 2nd claim onwards

strengths.text: HealthReturns™ can earn you back up to 100% of your annual premium by staying active; use it for OPD or health wearables.
Day-1 inpatient cover for listed chronic conditions (diabetes, hypertension, asthma, etc.) with PED and initial waiting periods waived in NXT/MAX+/SAVR variants.
strengths.basis: Chronic Care (Day 1 In-patient Hospitalization) with PED and initial waiting period waived for listed chronic conditions

strengths.text: Cancer Booster adds 100% of your base sum insured for cancer treatment, covering pre/post hospitalization and day care.
strengths.basis: cancer_booster.applicable up to 100% of Base Sum Insured

strengths.text: At ₹7,753/year for a 30-year-old with ₹10 lakh cover, the plan is competitively priced for such a feature-heavy wellness-linked offering.

sacrifices.text: 36-month pre-existing disease waiting period as base — among the longest. You can buy it down to 24 months or 1 year with an add-on, but still not immediate cover.
Room rent capped by category; the highest you can opt for is Single Private Room. No suite option, and shared option means you pay the difference if you use a private room.
Premium loading up to 150% is allowed based on health, BMI, or habits — the final price for high-risk individuals can be dramatically higher than indicative rates.
sacrifices.basis: loadingNote.maximum risk loading per person up to 150%

sacrifices.text: USA/Canada emergency cover only on VYTL and VIP variants; NXT, MAX+, and other India-focused variants exclude global cover, limiting portability.
sacrifices.basis: geographical extension to USA and Canada applicable for VYTL and VIP, not applicable for NXT/MAX+/SAVR

bitingGotchas.title: 36-month wait on pre-existing conditions
bitingGotchas.explanation: Pre-existing conditions are covered only after 36 months — reducible to 24/1 months on an optional cover.

ridersToConsider.whyForThisPerson: Cuts the 36-month wait on diabetes down to 24/1 months.

ridersToConsider.name: Chronic Care (Day 1 In-patient Hospitalization)
ridersToConsider.whyForThisPerson: Covers diabetes after a short wait instead of the full PED period.

specifiedDiseases.name: All Cysts, Mass, Swelling, Lump, Granulomas, Polyps, Fibroids & Benign Tumour of the female genito urinary system
Internal Derangement of Knee / Ligament or Tendon or Meniscus Tear
Stone in Gall Bladder, Bile duct & other parts of Biliary System
Fissure, Fistula in ano, hemorrhoids (piles), Pilonidal Sinus, Ano-rectal & Perianal Abscess
Gastric or Duodenal Erosions or Ulcers + Gastritis & Duodenitis & Colitis
Stones in Urinary system (Stone in the Kidney, Ureter, Urinary Bladder)
Benign Hypertrophy / Enlargement of Prostate (BHP / BEP)
Any swelling, tumour, cyst, nodule, ulcer, polyp Mass , Swelling, Lump, Granulomas, Benign Tumour anywhere in the body (unless malignant)

addOns.name: Reduction in Specific Disease Waiting Period
addOns.description: Reduces the applicable Specific Disease Waiting Period to 1 Year.

addOns.name: Reduction in Pre-Existing Disease Waiting Period
addOns.description: Reduces the applicable Pre-Existing Disease Waiting Period to a specified number of years as mentioned in the Policy Schedule.

addOns.name: Claim Protect (Non-Medical Expense Waiver)
addOns.description: Indemnifies Non-Medical Expenses listed under Annexure I (all 4 lists) incurred in relation to an admissible hospitalization claim.

addOns.name: Room Rent Type Options
addOns.description: Allows the Insured Person to modify the room type category eligibility.

addOns.name: Per Claim Deductible
addOns.description: A specified Deductible is applicable for each admissible claim, to be borne by the Insured Person.

addOns.name: Preferred Provider Network (PPN) Discount
addOns.description: Entitles the Policyholder to a 10% discount on the premium payable.

addOns.name: Critical Illness cover
addOns.description: Pays the Sum Insured as a lump sum upon diagnosis of a specified Critical Illness, after a 60-day waiting period and 15-day survival period.

addOns.name: Personal Accident Cover
addOns.description: Pays a lump sum in case of Accidental Death, Permanent Total Disablement, and Permanent Partial Disablement.

addOns.name: Chronic Care (Day 1 In-patient Hospitalization)
addOns.description: Applicable for listed chronic conditions (Diabetes, Hypertension, Asthma, Hyperlipidemia, COPD, Obesity, Coronary Artery Disease). PED waiting period and initial waiting period will be waived.

addOns.name: Chronic Management Program (OPD)
addOns.description: Applicable for listed chronic conditions on cashless basis.

addOns.name: Cancer Booster
addOns.description: Covers Pre and Post hospitalisation medical expense and Day Care Treatment up to Sum Insured.

addOns.name: Durable equipment cover
addOns.description: Covers Ventilator, Wheelchair, Prosthetic device, Suction Machine, Commode Chairs, Infusion pump, Continuous Passive motion devices in case of Knee Replacement, Oxygen concentrator.

addOns.name: Compassionate Visit
addOns.description: Up to INR 50,000 for two-way travel fare if hospitalization exceeds 10 days.

addOns.name: Second Medical Opinion for listed Major Illness
Annual Screening Package for Cancer Diagnosed Patients
Geographical extension to include USA and Canada
